name: MaxSAT-Based Feedback for Guiding Vision-Language Models in Sudoku
summary: arXiv:2607.12711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision--Language Models (VLMs) have recently demonstrated promising performance on structured visual reasoning tasks, including grid-based puzzles. H...
description: arXiv:2607.12711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision--Language Models (VLMs) have recently demonstrated promising performance on structured visual reasoning tasks, including grid-based puzzles. However, despite strong perceptual capabilities, these models lack explicit mechanisms for enforcing logical consistency and frequently generate assignments that violate underlying constraints. In this...
author: Pedro Orvalho, Guillem Aleny\`a, Felip Many\`a
